reviews.comment:
Lugar ideal para área cargar antes del cruce del desierto

(Translated by Google)
Ideal place to load area before crossing the desert
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnb2JtTXV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lento para cargar. El Full no tenía más que sandwiches de dudosa calidad y alto precio. Los baños, limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Very slow loading. The Full had nothing but overpriced, low-quality sandwiches. The bathrooms were clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3a0ppRzdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
No había comida a las 2 de la tarde y una persona para atender todo. Paren más Adelante

(Translated by Google)
There was no food at 2 PM and only one person to handle everything. Stop further ahead.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcWRXeGN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Parada muy recomendable en viaje desde o hacia las zonas de Bariloche, San Martín de los Andes, Caviahue, etc. Sanitarios en perfectas condiciones. Muy buen lugar para el descanso a orillas del Río Colorado y para la recarga de combustible. Todos los medios de pago y descuentos en combustible y shop a socios del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
A highly recommended stop on trips to or from Bariloche, San Martín de los Andes, Caviahue, etc. Restrooms in excellent condition. A great place to rest on the banks of the Colorado River and to refuel. All forms of payment accepted, and ACA members receive discounts on fuel and the shop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3b2NDdGp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno el Motel. Incluye desayuno. Muy bien ubicada, luego de cruzar la ruta del Desierto.

(Translated by Google)
The motel is very good. Breakfast is included. It's very well located, just after crossing the desert route.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBbVktbVhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo. Algo caro los alimentos. Nafta buen precio como en todo el sur. Y baño perfectamente limpio.

(Translated by Google)
Nice. Food is a bit pricey. Gas is reasonably priced, like everywhere in the south. And the bathroom is perfectly clean.

reviews.comment:
Lo unico bueno que tiene son los baños, la atención y calidad del full es pésima y muy lentos los que se ocupan de cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
The only good thing about it is the restrooms; the service and quality of the fuel are terrible, and the attendants are very slow.

excelente en variedad y atención y en sanitarios nuevos y limpios

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, lastima que no funcionan las máquinas de agua caliente y no sirven dentro en el sector de cafetería

(Translated by Google)
Good service, it's a shame the hot water machines don't work and they don't work inside the cafeteria area.
